sql_array: CREATE TABLE csv_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data_string STRING, processed_data_vector VECTOR);
CREATE PROCEDURE csv_callback (inout r ANY, in inx INT, inout cbd ANY) { IF (cbd IS NULL) cbd := vector(); cbd := vector_concat(cbd, vector(r)); };
SELECT csv_parse(data_string, 'DB.DBA.csv_callback', NULL, 0, 3) FROM csv_test WHERE data_string NOT LIKE '%value4%';
SELECT id, data_string, csv_parse(data_string, 'DB.DBA.csv_callback', NULL, 0, 3) NOT LIKE '%value1%' AS is_value1_excluded FROM csv_test WHERE processed_data_vector IS NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, data_string FROM csv_test WHERE data_string NOT LIKE '%value7%') AS subquery GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT id, processed_data_vector FROM csv_test WHERE processed_data_vector NOT LIKE vector(NULL) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT data_string) >= 1;
SELECT id FROM csv_test WHERE data_string NOT LIKE ('%value' || (SELECT id FROM csv_test WHERE data_string IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 1));
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_csv (temp_id INT, temp_data STRING);
INSERT INTO temp_csv (temp_id, temp_data) VALUES (1, ''), (2, 'some,data,here'), (3, NULL);
SELECT temp_id, csv_parse(temp_data, 'DB.DBA.csv_callback', NULL, 0, 2) FROM temp_csv WHERE temp_data NOT LIKE '%,%';
